summary: Iteration 49 STO backend testing — 23/23 pytest tests PASSED. Validated pre-deploy phase: public health/info, lead capture (idempotent upsert + 422 validation for email/name/country), KYC submit/status flow with JWT, portfolio read (200 deployed=false, 400 on invalid wallet), graceful 503 for on-chain endpoints (redemption/request, revenue/claim-build, admin mint/whitelist/nav/etc.), admin authorization stub (403 for non-admin user, 503 for admin since contracts not deployed), and regression on swap (hybrid/health, hybrid/quote) and launchpad (/health). Backend started cleanly without STO_*_ADDRESS env set.

minor.issue: When operator wallet not provided, code falls back to s.token_address (empty string in pre-deploy) — would raise InvalidAddress instead of clear 503 if require_deployed were skipped. Not user-facing now (require_deployed runs first), but fragile in post-deploy if admin user lacks wallet_address.
Same pattern: operator = user.get('wallet_address') or s.token_address. Should explicitly require an operator wallet input or fail with a clear 400 'admin operator wallet not configured'.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Harden admin endpoints so operator wallet must be explicitly provided or fetched from a configured signer, instead of silently falling back to s.token_address.
(Optional) Consider adding rate-limit on POST /api/sto/lead since it is unauthenticated to prevent flooding sto_leads collection.
critical_code_review_comments: sto_routes.py is 604 LOC — close to the 700-line guideline. As more on-chain endpoints get added post-deploy, recommend splitting into sto_public.py / sto_investor.py / sto_admin.py.
ABI loader silently returns [] on missing files — fine for pre-deploy but should log a warning so operators notice missing ABIs.

/api/sto/portfolio scans last 24 distributions inline (sync web3 calls inside async handler) — acceptable now (deployed=false short-circuits) but post-deploy this will block the event loop. Wrap in run_in_executor or build an indexer.
require_admin uses email suffix check (stub) — clearly documented as a stub; main agent should replace with a real role check before mainnet go-live.
All admin tx-build endpoints set nonce=0 — caller must replace nonce client-side; consider adding a comment in response payload to make this explicit for the frontend integrator.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@neonobleramp.com / Admin123!. Non-admin: dynamic test_sto_<rand>@example.com / Test1234! (registered fresh each run).
seed_data_creation: 1 lead per run inserted in sto_leads collection (email lead_<rand>@example.com). 1 KYC doc per run upserted in sto_kyc keyed by user_id. Both are TEST_-pattern transient and safe to leave.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 23 STO backend endpoints validated against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Contracts intentionally NOT deployed — on-chain endpoints return 503 by design. When STO_TOKEN_ADDRESS et al. are set, re-run this suite: the on-chain assertions (currently expecting 503) will need to be flipped to expect 200 with build-tx payload. Regression suites: swap/hybrid and launchpad endpoints verified up.
